headline: Today's top AI story: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft
bullets: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol autonomously post-trained the smaller Luna model with a "fairly underspecified prompt"
CodeQL 2.26.0 adds Kotlin 2.4.0 support and AI prompt injection detection - The GitHub Blog
Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach
